name: The Grob Tea Company Limited
summary: The Grob Tea Company Limited cultivates, manufactures, and sells tea in India. The company owns five tea gardens under the names of Doyang, Dessoie, Kanu, and Teen Ali tea estates located in the belt of Assam; and Pathemara tea estate in the Cachar district of Assam. Its gardens comprise an area of 4236.07 hectares and 2332.71 hectares of tea plantation. The company was incorporated in 1895 and is based in Kolkata, India.
